title: Deliciously Spicy Italian Paprika Stir-fry
description: A savory, chewy, indulgent Sicilian dish featuring dill, bhuna spices and Mediterranean-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Water or chicken broth (for boiling zucchini and peppers)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced onions and minced garlic, stir for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add bell peppers and zucchini slices to the wok. Season with paprika, dill, salt, black pepper, and a pinch of sugar (optional). Stir-fry vegetables for another 4-5 minutes.
Pour in water or broth if needed to cover the vegetables. Bring it to a boil then reduce heat to low, cover and simmer gently for about 10 minutes until the zucchini is tender but not mushy.
Garnish with sesame seeds and chopped cilantro before serving.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
